page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: ENCE524 or ENCE688Z.

Formerly: ENCE688Z.

ENCE637 Biological Principles of Environmental Engineering (3 Credits) An examination of biological principles directly affecting man and his environment, with particular emphasis on microbiological interactions in environmental engineering related to air, water and land systems; microbiology and biochemistry of aerobic and anaerobic treatment processes for aqueous wastes.
